Recommendation: Low-cost win-back campaign (e.g. "We miss you" email). If no response, deprioritize marketing spend on this group.
Send re-engagement campaigns with limited-time discounts before they churn completely.
Reward with loyalty perks, early access to new products, and VIP treatment. Ask for reviews/referrals.
Upsell and cross-sell. Encourage higher spend with bundle offers and personalized recommendations.
